zh.lifeSummary: 當Gertrud Gräfin von Habsburg於1191年5月2日出生在瑞士阿高姆利時，她的父親Rudolf II von Habsburg20歲，母親Agnes von Staufen29歲。她於大約1209年與Ludwig III. Graf von  Frohburg結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1241年在德國巴登享年50歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Gertrud Gräfin von Habsburg于1191年5月2日出生在瑞士阿高姆利时，她的父亲Rudolf II von Habsburg20岁，母亲Agnes von Staufen29岁。她于大约1209年与Ludwig III. Graf von  Frohburg结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1241年在德国巴登享年50岁。

nameMeanings.name: Gräfin
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Swedish: ornamental or habitational name formed with an unexplained (placename) element + the adjectival suffix -in, a derivative of Latin -in(i)us ‘relating to’.
Slovenian: probably a topographic name derived from grad ‘castle’, or from archaic gradina ‘site of ancient fort’.
Galician (Gradín): habitational name from a place called Gradín, in Lugo and Pontevedra provinces (in Galicia, Spain), from Latin (villam) Gratini, from the Latin name Gratinus.

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Gertrud
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: from gēr, gār ‘spear’ + þrūþ ‘strength’; the name of two famous 13th-century nuns of the Cistercian Abbey of Helfta near Eisleben, whose spiritual writings had a great influence.

variants.name: Gertraud
meanings: from gēr, gār ‘spear’ + þrūþ ‘strength’; the name of two famous 13th-century nuns of the Cistercian Abbey of Helfta near Eisleben, whose spiritual writings had a great influence.

variants.name: Gertraut
meanings: from gēr, gār ‘spear’ + þrūþ ‘strength’; the name of two famous 13th-century nuns of the Cistercian Abbey of Helfta near Eisleben, whose spiritual writings had a great influence.

en.lifeSummary: When Gertrud Gräfin von Habsburg was born on 2 May 1191, in Muri, Aargau, Switzerland, her father, Rudolf II von Habsburg, was 20 and her mother, Agnes von Staufen, was 29. She married Ludwig III. Graf von  Frohburg about 1209. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 1 daughter. She died in 1241, in Baden, Germany, at the age of 50.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Gertrud Gräfin von Habsburg est née le 2 mai 1191, à Muri, Argovie, Suisse, son père, Rudolf II von Habsburg, avait 20 ans et sa mère, Agnes von Staufen, avait 29 ans. Elle a épousé Ludwig III. Graf von  Frohburg environ 1209. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1241, à Baden, Allemagne, à l’âge de 50 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Gertrud Gräfin von Habsburg am 2. Mai 1191 in Muri, Aargau, Schweiz geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Rudolf II von Habsburg 20 und ihre Mutter Agnes von Staufen 29. Sie hat um 1209 Ludwig III. Graf von  Frohburg geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1241 im Alter von 50 Jahren in Baden, Deutschland.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Gertrud Gräfin von Habsburg è nata il il 2 maggio 1191 nel Muri, Argovia, Svizzera, sua padre, Rudolf II von Habsburg, aveva 20 anni e sua madre, Agnes von Staufen, aveva 29 anni. Lei sposato Ludwig III. Graf von  Frohburg circa 1209. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1241, nel Baden, Germania, all'età di 50 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Gertrud Gräfin von Habsburgが1191年5月2日にスイスアールガウムリで生まれた時，父Rudolf II von Habsburgは20歳，母Agnes von Staufenは29歳であった。約1209年にLudwig III. Graf von  Frohburgと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1241年にドイツバデンで50歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Gertrud Gräfin von Habsburg(이)가 1191년 5월 2일 스위스 아아르가 머이에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Rudolf II von Habsburg(은)는 20세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Agnes von Staufen(은)는 29세였다. 그녀는 대략 1209년 Ludwig III. Graf von  Frohburg(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1241년 독일 바든에서 50세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Gertrud Gräfin von Habsburg nasceu em 2 de maio de 1191, em Muri, Aargau, Suiça, seu pai, Rudolf II von Habsburg, tinha 20 anos e sua mãe, Agnes von Staufen, tinha 29 anos. Ela casou-se com Ludwig III. Graf von  Frohburg aproximadamente 1209. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1241, em Baden, Alemanha, com 50 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Gertrud Gräfin von Habsburg родилась 2 мая 1191 г. в местности мури, ааргау, Швейцария, её отцу по имени Rudolf II von Habsburg было 20 лет, а матери, которую звали Agnes von Staufen, 29. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Ludwig III. Graf von  Frohburg около 1209 г. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1241 г. в местности баден, Германия в возрасте 50 лет.

sm.liv. 1223-1241: mai le 1223 e o'o I le 1241

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Gertrud Gräfin von Habsburg nació el 2 de mayo de 1191, en Muri, Aargau, Suiza, su papá, Rudolf II von Habsburg, tenía 20 años y su mamá, Agnes von Staufen, tenía 29 años. Se casó con Ludwig III. Graf von  Frohburg aproximadamente 1209. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1241, en Baden, Alemania, a la edad de 50 años.
